parameters.query:
WITH recovered AS (
  UPDATE inbox.attachments
  SET upload_status = 'failed',
      upload_started_at = NULL,
      next_upload_at = now() + interval '5 minutes',
      storage_error = 'stale_upload_recovered'
  WHERE upload_status = 'uploading'
    AND upload_started_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
  RETURNING id
),
candidate AS (
  SELECT attachments.id
  FROM inbox.attachments
  WHERE attachments.telegram_file_id IS NOT NULL
    AND attachments.upload_attempts < 8
    AND COALESCE(attachments.next_upload_at, '-infinity'::timestamptz) <= now()
    AND (
      attachments.upload_status IN ('metadata_only', 'pending', 'failed')
      OR (attachments.upload_status = 'stored' AND attachments.checksum_sha256 IS NULL)
    )
    AND (NULLIF($1::text, '') IS NULL OR attachments.id = NULLIF($1::text, '')::uuid)
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN attachments.upload_status = 'stored' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    attachments.created_at
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
claimed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.attachments AS attachments
  SET upload_status = 'uploading',
      storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2',
      storage_bucket = COALESCE(attachments.storage_bucket, $2::text),
      storage_error = NULL,
      upload_attempts = attachments.upload_attempts + 1,
      upload_started_at = now(),
      next_upload_at = NULL
  FROM candidate
  WHERE attachments.id = candidate.id
  RETURNING attachments.*
)
SELECT
  claimed.id::text AS attachment_id,
  claimed.inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id,
  items.user_id::text AS user_id,
  claimed.telegram_file_id,
  claimed.original_name,
  claimed.mime_type,
  claimed.size_bytes,
  claimed.storage_bucket,
  claimed.upload_attempts,
  COALESCE(
    claimed.object_key,
    concat(
      'users/', items.user_id::text, '/',
      to_char(claimed.created_at, 'YYYY/MM'), '/',
      claimed.id::text, '/',
      regexp_replace(COALESCE(claimed.original_name, claimed.id::text), '[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+', '_', 'g')
    )
  ) AS object_key
FROM claimed
JOIN inbox.inbox_items AS items ON items.id = claimed.inbox_item_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT count(*) FROM recovered) AS recovery_done;

parameters.jsCode:
if ($json.attachment_id) return [];
return [{ json: { queue_status: 'idle', checked_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query:
WITH current_attachment AS (
  UPDATE inbox.attachments
  SET checksum_sha256 = $2::text
  WHERE id = $1::uuid
  RETURNING id, checksum_sha256
),
duplicate AS (
  SELECT
    attachments.id,
    attachments.storage_provider,
    attachments.storage_bucket,
    attachments.object_key,
    attachments.storage_path,
    attachments.etag,
    attachments.storage_class,
    attachments.uploaded_at,
    attachments.encryption
  FROM inbox.attachments AS attachments
  JOIN current_attachment ON attachments.checksum_sha256 = current_attachment.checksum_sha256
  WHERE attachments.id <> current_attachment.id
    AND attachments.upload_status = 'stored'
    AND attachments.object_key IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY attachments.uploaded_at NULLS LAST, attachments.created_at
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  current_attachment.id::text AS attachment_id,
  current_attachment.checksum_sha256,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM duplicate) AS is_duplicate,
  COALESCE((SELECT id::text FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_attachment_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT storage_provider FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_storage_provider,
  COALESCE((SELECT storage_bucket FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_storage_bucket,
  COALESCE((SELECT object_key FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_object_key,
  COALESCE((SELECT storage_path FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_storage_path,
  COALESCE((SELECT etag FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_etag,
  COALESCE((SELECT storage_class FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_storage_class,
  (SELECT uploaded_at FROM duplicate) AS duplicate_uploaded_at,
  COALESCE((SELECT encryption FROM duplicate), '') AS duplicate_encryption
FROM current_attachment;

parameters.jsCode:
const downloaded = $('Download Original from Telegram').first();
return [{ json: $json, binary: downloaded.binary }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE inbox.attachments
SET upload_status = 'stored',
    storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2',
    storage_bucket = $2::text,
    object_key = $3::text,
    storage_path = concat('s3://', $2::text, '/', $3::text),
    checksum_sha256 = $4::text,
    etag = nullif(trim(both '"' from $5::text), ''),
    storage_class = 'STANDARD',
    uploaded_at = now(),
    upload_started_at = NULL,
    next_upload_at = NULL,
    duplicate_of_attachment_id = NULL,
    encryption = 'provider-managed',
    storage_error = NULL
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id::text AS attachment_id, storage_provider, storage_bucket, object_key, storage_path, checksum_sha256, etag, upload_status, uploaded_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.attachment_id, $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.storage_bucket, $('Claim Pending Attachment').item.json.object_key, $('Resolve Stored Duplicate').item.json.checksum_sha256, $json.ETag || $json.eTag || $json.etag || '' ] }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE inbox.attachments
SET upload_status = 'stored',
    storage_provider = nullif($3::text, ''),
    storage_bucket = nullif($4::text, ''),
    object_key = nullif($5::text, ''),
    storage_path = COALESCE(nullif($6::text, ''), concat('s3://', $4::text, '/', $5::text)),
    checksum_sha256 = $2::text,
    etag = nullif($7::text, ''),
    storage_class = COALESCE(nullif($8::text, ''), 'STANDARD'),
    uploaded_at = COALESCE($9::timestamptz, now()),
    upload_started_at = NULL,
    next_upload_at = NULL,
    duplicate_of_attachment_id = $10::uuid,
    encryption = COALESCE(nullif($11::text, ''), 'provider-managed'),
    storage_error = NULL
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id::text AS attachment_id, duplicate_of_attachment_id::text AS duplicate_of_attachment_id, storage_path, checksum_sha256, upload_status;

UPDATE inbox.attachments
SET upload_status = 'failed',
    upload_started_at = NULL,
    next_upload_at = CASE
      WHEN upload_attempts >= 8 THEN NULL
      ELSE now() + make_interval(mins => LEAST(60, power(2, GREATEST(upload_attempts - 1, 0))::integer))
    END,
    storage_error = left($2::text, 1000)
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id::text AS attachment_id, upload_status, upload_attempts, next_upload_at, storage_error;
